jobs.name: config-backup
jobs.description: Backup openclaw.json to Git daily (only commits if changed)
jobs.summary: Runs the config-backup plugin to commit OpenClaw configuration changes to git and report failures.

jobs.name: evening-briefing
jobs.description: Weekday 9 PM briefing: what's on tap tomorrow morning
jobs.summary: Reads the synced calendar snapshots and sends a short Discord briefing about tomorrow's schedule.

jobs.name: evening-alarm-reminder
jobs.description: Nightly 10:30 PM: remind Jeff to check alarm if early morning work meeting
jobs.summary: Checks for early work meetings or late-night/early-morning conflicts and warns Jeff to adjust plans or alarms.

jobs.name: Daily package delivery check
jobs.summary: Reviews tracked packages for today's deliveries or notable updates and removes delivered items.

jobs.name: plugin-health-check
jobs.description: Daily plugin health check — posts failures to #octo-status; silent on all-pass
jobs.summary: Daily smoke test that calls one tool from every configured plugin and reports pass/fail to Discord.

jobs.name: late-early-conflict-morning-check
jobs.description: 10 AM daily: flag if today has late meeting (after 6 PM) and tomorrow has early meeting (before 9 AM)
jobs.summary: Looks for late meetings today plus early meetings tomorrow and flags the conflict early enough to reschedule.

jobs.name: Lobster changelog weekly scan
jobs.description: Weekly Monday scan of lobster.shahine.com/changelog for new ideas
jobs.summary: Scans the Lobster changelog for new ideas worth adopting and reports only when something changed.

jobs.name: Log rotation - openclaw.log
jobs.summary: Runs copy-truncate rotation for the main OpenClaw log and keeps a bounded archive set.

jobs.name: Nightly browser recycle
jobs.description: Stop and restart the OpenClaw-managed browser profile nightly to clear stale tabs/workers and keep CDP healthy.
jobs.summary: Restarts the headless Camoufox browser instance overnight to reclaim memory and clear stale sessions.

jobs.name: openclaw-upgrade-readiness-check
jobs.summary: Checks for new OpenClaw releases and evaluates whether an upgrade is safe based on changelog and config compatibility.

jobs.name: usage-summary-weekly
jobs.summary: Aggregates weekly LLM usage metrics across all providers into a summary report.

jobs.name: weekly-cost-report
jobs.description: Monday 5 AM PT: generate weekly LLM cost report for last 7 days and post to #root
jobs.summary: Generates a weekly LLM API cost report, renders it to PDF, posts to Discord, and commits the artifacts.

jobs.name: agent-review-weekly
jobs.description: Weekly Monday self-improvement analysis — scan session transcripts, tool failures, and memory for patterns; deliver prioritized suggestions to Jeff via Discord DM.
jobs.summary: Scans session transcripts, tool failures, and memory files for patterns; deduplicates recurring findings via fingerprint state, auto-files guarded GitHub issues, and delivers a prioritized weekly report via Discord DM.

jobs.name: calendar-fetch
jobs.description: Fetch calendars at midnight and hourly 7am-5pm PST
jobs.summary: Runs a shell script to sync calendar data from all configured providers without using LLM tokens.

jobs.name: portfolio-closing-briefing
jobs.summary: Pulls closing prices for Jeff's portfolio and sends a concise end-of-day market summary.
